heading: Singleton Heights vs Singleton Military Area — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Singleton Heights, New South Wales and Singleton Military Area, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Singleton Military Area has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Singleton Heights (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Singleton Heights or Singleton Military Area safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Singleton Heights has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Singleton Military Area scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Singleton Heights scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Singleton Military Area scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Singleton Heights or Singleton Military Area?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Singleton Military Area has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
